use_cases: Add animated sparkle effects to hero sections or landing pages
Create celebratory visual moments with floating particle animations
Enhance loading states with decorative background particle effects
Create interactive background effects for marketing campaigns
Add visual depth to empty states or transition screens
ai_summary: A customizable particle animation system for React that generates sparkle and floating particle effects with configurable density, speed, opacity, size, and color. Built on tsparticles, this component serves as a versatile visual enhancement layer that can be applied to any section or hero component to create immersive, dynamic backgrounds with customizable particle behavior and aesthetics.
